finding: Live backend on port 8081 disappeared during discovery crawl.
evidence: No listener on 8081 after crawl attempts; original bootRun/java processes exited.
GET /api/v3/api-docs returned HTTP 500 unauthenticated, then timed out when called with a valid bearer token.

finding: Actuator mappings endpoint is not available for discovery.
evidence: GET /api/actuator/mappings returned 401 without auth and 404 with a valid bearer token.

finding: Current source tree cannot compile cleanly.
evidence: bootRun compile phase failed on DepositController/CardController/StatementController symbol and signature mismatches.

finding: Starting from already-built classes also fails.
evidence: bootRun -x compileJava -x processResources failed with ConflictingBeanDefinitionException between com.cbs.merchant.controller.MerchantController and com.cbs.card.controller.MerchantController.

finding: Keycloak test users referenced by E2E are absent from the running cbs realm.
evidence: cbs realm contained only enabled user admin until a temporary diagnostic user was created for discovery.
